policy: Do not physically move active roots until scripts, docs, Replit export, and paper build paths are path-agnostic. Use this taxonomy first as a stable classification layer.

records.role: Vite/React product, Node API, manifests, extracted text, wiki, evaluation, and reproducibility scripts.
records.futureAction: May be renamed to app/ only after all scripts and deployment docs are path-agnostic.

records.role: User/client supplied official IR, DART, PDF, PPT, and source URL packages.
records.futureAction: May become sources/knowledge-base after inventory scripts support SOURCE_ROOT.

records.role: Read-only reference snapshot from the Replit-built Hanwha advisor PoC.
records.futureAction: May become archive/original-poc/HanWha-Advisor-main after source references are stabilized.

records.role: Paused arXiv LaTeX draft workspace; product development remains priority.
records.futureAction: May become papers/arxiv after paper build paths are checked.

records.role: External source download staging area already reconciled against Knowledge Base by SHA-256.
records.futureAction: Archive after no pending source drops depend on this folder.

records.role: External paper used for structure benchmarking.
records.futureAction: Move to references/papers/ElizaOS.pdf in physical migration stage.

records.role: Previously published AI marketing automation agent paper used as related/prior work reference.
records.futureAction: Move to references/prior-work/electronics-14-04161-v2.pdf in physical migration stage.
Remove during repository packaging, not during source classification.
